title: McCollum plays MSG villain as Hawks tie series
content: CJ McCollum became the latest to join the list of Madison Square Garden villains as his fourth-quarter exploits helped the Hawks tie their first-round series against the Knicks with a come-from-behind 107-106 win in Game 2.

title: McDaniels jab: Nuggets are 'all bad defenders'
content: Jaden McDaniels took perhaps his most notable shot after Minnesota's 119-114 Game 2 playoff win at Denver, saying the Nuggets are "all bad defenders."

title: Gobert carries DPOY snub into Jokic matchup, win
content: On the same day he finished fourth in Defensive Player of the Year voting, Timberwolves center Rudy Gobert held three-time MVP Nikola Jokic to 1-of-8 shooting in their Game 2 matchup, helping Minnesota to a series-tying 119-114 win.

title: Sources: Madubuike has neck surgery, may return
content: Ravens DT Nnamdi Madubuike underwent neck surgery last week that left his doctors believing he will be able to resume playing this season, sources told ESPN.

title: Martinook lifts Canes in 2OT after goal overturn
content: Jordan Martinook, who was stopped on a penalty shot in the first overtime session after a potential winning goal was overturned, beat Linus Ullmark at 13:53 of the second overtime to help the Carolina Hurricanes past the Ottawa Senators 3-2 Monday night.

title: Teen dies, Coach K's grandson charged with DWI
content: Joseph Savarino, a grandson of retired coach Mike Krzyzewski, was charged with misdemeanor driving while impaired in connection with a collision that killed a 15-year-old bicyclist.

title: PGA Tour boots both Hawaii events from '27 sked
content: The PGA Tour will not be in Hawaii in 2027 for the first time in 56 years as it moves toward a revamped schedule that no longer will start the season in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

title: Counsell: MLB rule in place for Ohtani 'bizarre'
content: Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell thinks that a Major League Baseball rule that allows the Los Angeles Dodgers to carry 14 pitchers because of Shohei Ohtani is "bizarre," adding that the defending National League MVP is getting "special consideration."

title: 🏈 NFL Draft Day Predictor: Settling big debates
content: Our analytics model crunches the numbers on Ty Simpson, Jeremiyah Love and how four NFL teams should approach their first-round picks.

title: NFL draft rankings: Kiper finalizes his Big Board with the top 150 prospects, best at every position
content: Mel Kiper Jr. updated his draft rankings one last time. His Big Board stacks 150 prospects -- starting with Fernando Mendoza -- and goes deep at every position.

title: 'It's 100 or die': How throwing 100 mph went from a novelty to the norm in MLB
content: Hitting 100 mph on the radar gun is a badge of honor. Here's why the number of pitchers who have reached it has exploded.

title: Tim Duncan, David Robinson ... LeBron: What Victor Wembanyama's Game 1 signals for the NBA
content: Wembanyama will always be linked to Duncan and Robinson, but after Sunday night's dominant Game 1, it was another generational star to whom he was being compared: LeBron James.

title: Fallacy or fact? Why Lakers' shooting records in Game 1 could be good news for Rockets
content: Examining how Game 1's shotmaking gap could actually be good news for Houston in its series versus L.A.

title: How the 'Lumber Yard' was built: Inside the Avalanche's goaltending tandem
content: The professional lives of Mackenzie Blackwood and Scott Wedgewood intersected twice before suiting up together for Colorado.

title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Sabres, Avs, Knights, Canadiens look to go up 2-0
content: Here's a preview of Tuesday's four games, along with stat leaders and a look back on a wild Monday night.

content: After months of searching, we've found the prospect we believe is the 2026 NFL draft's best-kept secret.

title: How will Browns use their two first-round draft picks?
content: Cleveland's front office is seeking "difference-makers and elite-level talent" at the No. 6 and No. 24 picks.

title: What questions do Alabama, Georgia, BYU, Oregon and others face after spring ball?
content: Eleven notable teams and CFP contenders head into summer with some unresolved things that need answers.

title: Soccer's incredible shrinking shin guards could be a dangerous problem
content: Some players think that smaller shin guards -- literally the size of a small notebook -- make them faster. Others around the game think it's a major injury waiting to happen.

title: Why Guardiola's legacy could exceed the likes of Ferguson, Wenger, Klopp
content: Exit as a Premier League champion like Sir Alex Ferguson? Or leave behind a strong foundation like Jurgen Klopp? Pep Guardiola has the chance to do both.

title: Is the new Premier League ball behind all the long-range goals? We asked a scientist
content: Teams are taking fewer long-range shots this season, but they're still scoring stunning goals from distance.

title: The Warriors begin an offseason with massive uncertainty
content: Golden State enters another offseason in search of a co-star for Stephen Curry, and the Warriors might be searching for a new coach too.

title: The player most likely to be traded for all 30 MLB teams -- and 6 if-all-goes-wrong candidates
content: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be on the trade block come August.

title: WrestleMania 42 Night 2 takeaways: Will Reigns make this title run alone?
content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: Men's college basketball buzz: State of blue blood rebuilds
content: North Carolina awaits a decision from Henri Veesaar while Kansas and Kentucky vie for the No. 1 recruit.

title: Women's transfer rankings: No. 1 Audi Crooks commits to Oklahoma State
content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: Barça have gone backward, Madrid set for barren year. How can they be fixed?
content: The pain of early Champions League exits might actually work in Barcelona's and Real Madrid's favor: It's now clear for all to see where their deficiencies are.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye Real Madrid star as Casemiro replacement
content: Manchester United have added Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni to their shortlist. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: F1's rule tweaks: What's changed after driver criticism, and will it make a difference?
content: Formula 1 has delivered a set of rules tweaks to its controversial 2026 regulations -- but what do they mean and will they appease drivers ahead of the Miami GP? ESPN's Laurence Edmondson explains.

title: Prospect watch: Is Cleveland ready for a new catcher?
content: All the prospects fantasy managers should be keeping an eye on as the season continues to move through its first month.

title: Top scorers, sleepers and streamers: Fantasy hoops outlooks for every WNBA team
content: Scouting reports and fantasy-relevant player picks from each team in the WNBA, including the two new expansions.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: Thrissur fireworks unit blast: CM, Opposition leader express condolences
content: Pinarayi Vijayan directs government machinery to be prepared to ensure medical assistance to those affected by the explosion

title: More stretches in city centre to see paid parking system
content: The parking fee has been set at ₹15 per hour for two-wheelers, increasing to ₹30 for the second hour and rising by ₹15 for every subsequent hour; for four-wheelers, the price is set at ₹30 per hour.

title: Procedure for correcting errors in last name simplified in Kerala
content: Changes will be applicable to those who want to expand their initials, to change name after marriage and to correct spelling mistakes

title: Assembly Elections 2026 highlights: Electrifying campaign for Tamil Nadu polls ends
content: The model code of conduct is already in place since the announcement of the Assembly election and will continue till the election process is completed

title: Country’s first interactive reality talk show dedicated to innovative farmers kicks off
content: The one-hour weekly programme titled Raitha Rathna, being telecast by DD Chandana, will feature innovative farmers on “hot seat”

title: Delay in fixing Kolleru Lake boundaries irks SC-appointed panel
content: The Central Empowered Committee is said to have asked the government to be prepared to present its position before the Supreme Court when the matter comes up for hearing

title: DPR on Mekedatu getting ready and will be submitted to Centre in 10 days: D.K. Shivakumar
content: The Karnataka government had formed a technical team led by Karnataka Engineering Research Station (KERS) Director to expedite the Mekedatu project after the SC order

title: Allegations of irregularities resurface in government college Principal appointments
content: A section of teachers approach Kerala Administrative Tribunal alleging that the appointments were made by bypassing the University Grants Commission norms

title: Will the NDA, under the AIADMK, be lucky this time after  previous setbacks?
content: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami has been helming the National Democratic Alliance. He has more than once proved who is calling the shots in the alliance

title: Snakebite death of child in Thrissur: lawyer seeks compensation for family
content: Two children were bitten by a snake at Mattathur, Thrissur, while they were asleep inside their house. One had died and other is undergoing treatment

title: Naidu pushes for double-engine government in Tamil Nadu
content: TDP chief calls for Centre-State synergy to accelerate growth, jobs and welfare, flags slowdown and pitches NDA as catalyst for development

title: After TVK’s nomination rejection in Edappadi, Vijay backs independent candidate
content: TVK chief urged people to vote for Mr. Premkumar under the ‘Television’ symbol; Mr. Vijay announced his support for an independent candidate after his party’s candidate’s nomination was rejected.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: TVK out of poll race in Edappadi constituency after rejection of nominations
content: Consequently, the original four-corner fight in the constituency has turned into a three-corner fight between the AIADMK, DMK, and NTK.

title: Climate change fuels surge in heatwaves
content: Andhra Pradesh witnessed a drastic increase from 833 heatstroke cases in 2023 to 5,154 cases in 2025, according to the Department of Health, Medical Education and Family Welfare

title: Bihar Women Commission issues notice to MP Pappu Yadav over his “uncharitable” remarks against women in politics
content: Commission asks Purnea MP Pappu Yadav to explain why he made such remarks and why a recommendation should not be sent to the Lok Sabha Speaker seeking to declare his membership null and void

title: BJP State president calls for proper use of Central funds in waste management
content: Madhav flags idle infrastructure created under Finance Commission grants in several panchayats across Andhra Pradesh, urges better maintenance and utilisation

title: 48 accident-prone black spots identified across Tirupati district
content: Collector assures to clear all the black spots in the next 60 days during an inspection held across the the highway stretches in the district

title: Mass relocation of trees near KBR Park sparks fresh environmental concerns
content: More than 1,500 trees face felling and hundreds are being shifted from KBR Park stretch, with activists alleging flawed surveys, legal violations, and ecological risks

title: Mamata's associate Humayun Kabir wants to build Babri Masjid in Bengal; won't allow it: Amit Shah
content: The senior BJP leader also promised that a Uniform Civil Code (UCC) would be implemented in the State if the party came to power

title: George Kutty, a beloved figure in Bengaluru’s film society movement, no more
content: As the driving force behind the Bangalore Film Society and the editor of Deep Focus magazine, George Kutty brought thought-provoking and socially relevant films to the forefront

title: Nitish picks Shrawan Kumar as JD(U)’s Legislature Party leader
content: The post fell vacant after Nitish Kumar resigned as Chief Minister on April 14; sources in the JD(U) say he has picked a leader from his caste, the Kurmis, to keep his vote bank intact

title: Jagan slams action against employee union leader
content: The government has failed to deliver on key election promises and is resorting to vindictive measures against critics, alleges the YSRCP chief

title: BMTC to add independent external monitoring layer to smart ticketing system as 11,000 ETMs rolled out
content: In March, the BMTC began rolling out a fully integrated digital ticketing system as part of a major push to modernise its operations

title: 13 killed in massive fireworks unit blast ahead of Thrissur Pooram
content: At least 13 people were killed in explosion at a facility preparing materials for Thiruvambady wing of Thrissur Pooram; unconfirmed reports suggest around 40 people may have been inside the unit

title: Over 28,000 candidates to get various degrees from Karnatak University tomorrow
content: The Governor will preside over the event, while the former ISRO chairman A.S. Kiran Kumar will deliver the convocation address

title: Sridhar Babu pitches for Norwegian, Italian investments
content: Minister says State ready to be Norway’s preferred partner for Life Sciences, healthcare and green tech, urges Italian firms to invest in advanced manufacturing

title: Left parties see deliberate bid to delay women’s reservation
content: The NDA has shown no intent to implement the Bill passed in 2023 and linked it to delimitation knowing well that it delays implementation further, they allege

title: Opinion: Opinion | Iran's Game Of Thrones: Inside The 'Group' That Wants Ghalibaf Gone, And No Deal
content: A section of the IRGC is firmly opposed to any negotiations and would like the war to continue in the hope of a total victory. Another faction would like negotiations, but with maximalist demands on the US.

title: Mossad Operative Behind Op Roaring Lion Was Killed On Mission, Says Spy Chief
content: "During 'Operation Roaring Lion,' my thoughts and heart were filled with pride in the character and actions of M., who fell outside Israel while carrying out his duty," Mossad's director, David Barnea said.

title: Naga, Kukis Clash In Manipur's Senapati District After Civilians Ambushed
content: The incident comes in the backdrop of escalating strain between the two communities following the recent killings along the Imphal-Ukhrul road.

title: "International Waters Not Refuge": US' Tanker Action In Indo-Pacific
content: The United States on Tuesday said its forces carried out a maritime interdiction operation on a "stateless" sanctioned tanker in the Indo-Pacific region, without any incident.

title: Rs 300-Crore Alleged 'Chana Dal' Scam Hits Darjeeling Hills Ahead Of Bengal Polls
content: The controversy erupted after the Indian Gorkha Janshakti Front (IGJF) publicly accused the GTA of failing to account for a large consignment of chana dal sanctioned under a central government initiative.

title: 'Unprovoked Acts Of Terror': UAE Minister To NDTV On Iran's Drone Attacks
content: Before a two-week ceasefire between the United States and Iran took effect, the UAE had borne the brunt of Tehran's attacks, weathering more Iranian strikes than any other country, though most were intercepted.

title: 8 Killed, Many Injured In Firecracker Factory Blast In Kerala's Thrissur
content: The mishap occurred in a shed where crackers were being prepared on behalf of a temple devaswom ahead of the upcoming Thrissur Pooram, which falls on April 26.

title: SpaceX Executive Outearns Elon Musk With Rs 800 Crore Salary A Year
content: She even surpassed founder Elon Musk, who reportedly received a salary of just $54,080 during the same period.

title: Mallikarjun Kharge Calls PM Modi "A Terrorist", Then Clarifies
content: Mallikarjun Kharge was questioning the AIADMK's choice of BJP as an alliance partner for the Tamil Nadu polls when the he used the word terrorist for the PM.

title: "He Called To Kiss My A**": Trump's Tim Cook Post Is All About Himself
content: Trump's post on Tim Cook was dotted with incidents of "big helps" (for Cook) and the Apple boss calling him to "kiss his a**."

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Trump Accuses Iran Of Violating Ceasefire 'Numerous Times'
content: US-Iran War, Ceasefire, Peace Talks Updates: The war is in its eighth week and has sent oil prices surging because of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Major Terror Plot Uncovered In Delhi, Men Working For ISI Proxy Arrested: Cops
content: The police said Rajveer was preparing to target a major hotel in Delhi-NCR and was receiving instructions from Pakistan on the task.

title: Tiger, Leopard, Cheetah Seen Together In Rare Ranthambore Moment
content: In a rare and remarkable moment, three of the wild's most elusive predators, a tiger, a leopard and a cheetah, were sighted within the same landscape and time frame in Ranthambore's Zone 9, the Rajasthan Forest Department said.

title: Iran Tanker 'Silly City' Slips Past US Blockade Despite Warning: Report
content: US President Donald Trump said that the US blockade will remain in place for now. He also said that a two-week ceasefire with Iran, which is set to expire Wednesday evening, will not be extended.

title: Indian Connection Of Israeli Soldier Who Died Fighting Hamas On October 7
content: Israel observed its annual Memorial Day on Monday, a solemn occasion when the country pauses to remember those killed in wars and terror attacks.

title: 2 Indian-Origin Men Charged With H-1B Fraud. They Hired For 'Ghost' Jobs
content: Between June 2020 and January 2023, the two submitted multiple fraudulent H-1B visa petitions using Rajidi's firm, claiming that foreign workers would be employed in roles linked to the University of California.

title: Yusuf Pathan's In-Laws Beat Mumbai Family With Sticks, Baseball Bat, Arrested
content: Water that had accumulated on a road in Mumbai's Byculla area splashed onto Yusuf Pathan's in-laws, leading to a verbal and physical altercation.

title: Defence Ministry signs ₹975-crore deal for TRAWL systems to boost Army’s minefield breaching capability
content: The project is expected to boost domestic industry, particularly MSMEs, through component manufacturing and generate both direct and indirect employment

title: Drying Bharathapuzha exposes impact of human intervention
content: Despite presence of numerous check dams and regulators, nearly 100 local bodies along the river and its tributaries are grappling with water scarcity

title: Air Arabia flight from Abu Dhabi lands safely in Thiruvananthapuram after suspected bird strike
content: Despite the suspected bird hit, the crew continued the flight in accordance with standard safety procedures. The aircraft completed its journey without incident and landed safely in Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala

title: After 80 yrs, Japan opens its weapons sector to world - what it means for India
content: Japan, shifting from its pacifist constitution, is now poised to export lethal weapons. This significant policy change, driven by regional security concerns, allows Tokyo to leverage its advanced defense technology. The move opens new avenues for its burgeoning defense industry, potentially transforming Japan into a major global arms supplier.

title: Leave, holidays and encashment: What India’s changing labour laws mean for employees
content: For employers and employees, understanding how leave works today is not always straightforward. This is because two legal systems operate side by side: the new central labour codes and the older State-level Shops and Establishments (S&E) laws.

title: 'Never been more ...':Tim Cook in memo to employees on his exit as Apple CEO
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook announced his transition to executive chairman later this year, after a 15-year tenure. He expressed confidence in Apple's future and its core values, praising the team's dedication. John Ternus, SVP of hardware engineering, will succeed Cook as CEO, with Cook pledging to support the smooth transition.

title: ‘Just like Triple H’- Ashwin’s wild WWE comparison for Pandya goes viral
content: Tilak Varma's maiden IPL century, a blistering 101 off 45 balls, powered Mumbai Indians to a vital win. Ravichandran Ashwin lauded the innings as one of the best he's seen, highlighting Hardik Pandya's mid-pitch encouragement as a key motivator. Varma's aggressive display against a strong attack and Mumbai's late surge sealed the victory.

title: Amazon files lawsuit after losing millions in fake laptop and GPU refunds
content: A sophisticated refund scam has cost Amazon $4 million in stolen goods like graphics cards and laptops. A group named RBK allegedly exploited customer support by claiming packages never arrived, even using fake police reports. Amazon uncovered the scheme through an undercover investigator, leading to a lawsuit against named individuals and unknown accomplices.

title: Absolutely no shortage! IOCL assures sufficient supply of petrol, diesel amid Middle East crisis
content: Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) assures stable petrol and diesel supplies despite Middle East conflict, holding sufficient reserves for 12-16 days. While LPG delivery timelines have stretched to six days due to increased bookings, domestic refineries meet nearly 80% of Punjab's demand, with coordinated efforts ensuring uninterrupted fuel availability.

title: 'No top teams in PSL': Ali drops reality check after Babar Azam's heroics
content: Babar Azam’s century led Peshawar Zalmi to a dominant win, earning praise from Basit Ali and Kamran Akmal. They credited his partnership with Kusal Mendis but stressed it shouldn’t define his international form. Basit said, “There is a world of difference between international cricket and PSL,” adding such performances must be replicated at the highest level to silence critics.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' BO day 5: Akshay Kumar starrer chases Rs 100cr domestic milestone
content: 'Bhooth Bangla' Day 5 box office tracking shows the Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan film crossing the Rs. 100 crore mark globally. Despite a 70% drop on its first Monday, the horror-comedy remains a topic of discussion for its nostalgic cast including Paresh Rawal and Rajpal Yadav. As of April 21, 2026, the domestic net collection stands at Rs. 65.46 crore.

title: 10 Numbers that tell the ‘story’ of Tim Cook's 15 years as Apple CEO
content: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO after fifteen years, transitioning to Executive Chairman. Under his leadership, Apple's market cap surged to $4 trillion, and net income grew by 699% through a focus on Services and ecosystem expansion. He also launched successful products like the Apple Watch and AirPods, and championed environmental initiatives.

title: ‘Zero impact’: Ex-India captain roasts Parag, Rahane in worst batter debate
content: Former captain Krishnamachari Srikkanth has sharply criticized Riyan Parag's batting form in the IPL, questioning his impact and comparing him unfavorably to Ajinkya Rahane. Srikkanth also believes Mumbai Indians are poised for a playoff surge, while dismissing Kolkata Knight Riders and Lucknow Super Giants' chances. He favors Sunrisers Hyderabad over Delhi Capitals, citing a batting concern.

title: ‘India does not forget’: Army's strong message on Pahalgam terror attack anniversary
content: A year after the Pahalgam terror attack, India reaffirms its resolve with Operation Sindoor, a decisive response against cross-border terrorism. The operation saw Indian forces strike terror bases in Pakistan, eliminating over 100 terrorists and destroying launchpads. This reinforced India's zero-tolerance stance against state-sponsored terrorism.

title: Dianna Russini’s troubles deepen amid Mike Vrabel affair claims
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ NFL reporter, Dianna Russini, are still the talk of the town due to their alleged affair drama that sparked shockwaves across the league, a few days ago. While both have distanced themselves from the drama, it seems the scandal has now taken a turn for the worse.

title: Bills eye $120m 49ers star to boost offense amid injuries
content: The Buffalo Bills have been a force to be reckoned with on the field even as the team ended up losing in the Divisional Round against the Denver Broncos in the last season and against the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC Championship game in the 2024 season. Though these were heartbreaking losses, the Buffalo Bills remain focused on bouncing back on the field as they work on their roster.

title: Ayesha Curry shares holiday snaps after Stephen Curry’s playoff exit
content: After the Golden State Warriors’ playoff exit, Stephen Curry and his family took time to unwind at Coachella. Ayesha Curry shared candid moments from the trip, highlighting a relaxed and joyful atmosphere with close family. The couple enjoyed performances by major artists, including Justin Bieber. Meanwhile, the Warriors face uncertainty, with Steve Kerr openly reflecting on the team’s future and his own role.

title: Alan Osmond from the musical group 'The Osmonds' passes away at age 76
content: Alan Osmond, the cherished figure from the legendary musical dynasty 'The Osmonds', has sadly left us at the age of 76. He passed away on April 20th, enveloped in the love of his wife and eight devoted sons. Having battled multiple sclerosis for four decades, Alan chose to retreat from the limelight.

title: ‘Values set by Mahi bhai': Samson explains MS Dhoni’s CSK influence
content: Sanju Samson feels a heightened sense of responsibility after joining the star-studded Chennai Super Kings, adapting quickly to the calm and cool team culture. Despite the team's mixed IPL campaign and growing injury concerns, Samson has shown flashes of brilliance, becoming CSK's second-highest run-scorer. His role is expected to expand further with Ayush Mhatre's injury.

title: Blake Lively backs Bieber as Taylor Swift–Travis Kelce buzz grows
content: Blake Lively sparked online debate after defending Justin Bieber amid criticism of his Coachella performance. Her comments drew mixed reactions, with some praising her support while others questioned her motives, especially given her ties to Taylor Swift. The discussion intensified as buzz around Swift’s relationship with Travis Kelce and their rumored wedding continues to dominate headlines.

title: IPL 2026: 5 players who could replace injured Ayush Mhatre in CSK
content: Chennai Super Kings face a setback as Ayush Mhatre is out of IPL 2026 due to a hamstring injury. This adds to their existing injury concerns. The team is now looking for replacements to maintain their momentum. Several players like Deepak Hooda, Swastik Chikara, Atharva Taide, Manan Vohra, and Yash Dhull are being considered to fill the void.

title: Archaeologists find world’s oldest beer receipt; decode surprising message
content: Researchers have identified the world's oldest known beer receipt, a small clay tablet from ancient Mesopotamia detailing beer supplied to workers. This everyday transaction, discovered during a review of museum collections, highlights the early use of writing for managing trade, labor, and resources, offering a human glimpse into ancient life.

title: Fortuner at gate, gunshots at 2am: How a parking feud turned fatal in Delhi's Preet Vihar
content: A parking dispute over a Fortuner tragically escalated into murder in East Delhi's Preet Vihar early Monday. Pankaj Nayyar, 34, was shot dead outside his family home by a tenant neighbour, Gaurav Sharma, after an argument over vehicle placement. Sharma, along with two accomplices, allegedly attacked Pankaj and his brother before fleeing.

title: IPL 2026: KL Rahul closing in on MS Dhoni’s record, set to overtake CSK legend
content: KL Rahul is on the cusp of a significant IPL milestone, needing just 50 runs against Sunrisers Hyderabad to surpass MS Dhoni as the sixth-highest run-scorer. Rahul's aggressive batting this season, marked by a strike rate near 170, has seen him amass 168 runs so far. He has already outscored Dhoni in keeper-specific 50+ scores.

title: Man who lost Rs 2 crore during Covid shares one line in metro and the internet is hooked
content: A viral metro video is resonating with viewers for its raw honesty. A man, who lost nearly Rs 2 crore in his Indian business due to the pandemic, shared his journey of rebuilding. Now working in Dubai, his simple yet profound message, 'Life goes on,' offers a powerful lesson in resilience and moving forward after immense hardship.

title: 'Daddy me dum ho toh rok lena': BJP MLA’s viral warning to cop after son rams 5 with Thar
content: A political storm brews in Shivpuri after a video surfaced showing BJP MLA Pritam Lodhi confronting police.  Lodhi allegedly warned Karera SDOP Ayush Jakhad regarding action taken against his son.  The incident follows an accident where an SUV, reportedly driven by the MLA's son, injured five people. Police maintain due procedure was followed in the investigation.

title: Ayush Mhatre injury bombshell: CSK youngster ruled out of IPL 2026
content: Chennai Super Kings' Ayush Mhatre is out of IPL 2026 due to a left hamstring injury sustained on April 18 against Sunrisers Hyderabad. The franchise confirmed the batter requires six to twelve weeks of rehabilitation, ending his season. Mhatre continued batting after the initial injury before its severity was assessed.

title: ICSE Class 10 Result 2026: Viral “tomorrow release” claim false, CISCE expected to announce in late April
content: A viral claim suggesting that the ICSE Class 10 Result 2026 will be declared tomorrow has been denied by the Council for the Indian School Certificate Examinations (CISCE). An official clarified that no result date has been announced and the circulating notice is fake. However, results are likely to be released in the last week of April 2026. Students are advised to rely only on official CISCE websites for updates and avoid misinformation on social media.

title: How Sawan Barwal Broke India’s Longest-Standing Record and Still Wanted More
content: Sawan Barwal broke India’s 48-year-old marathon national record in his debut at Rotterdam, but the achievement was overshadowed by disappointment over missing his target. Barwal looks back at the race, the collapse in the closing stretch, the support system behind the run and the reason for switching from 5000m, 10000m to marathon.

title: 'Rahul Gandhi se chalne wala nahi hai': Tej Pratap Yadav backs Priyanka as INDIA bloc face
content: Tej Pratap Yadav endorsed Priyanka Gandhi to lead the Congress, deeming her capable like Indira Gandhi, while questioning Rahul Gandhi's leadership. This statement followed Rahul Gandhi's criticism of Nitish Kumar and came amid existing doubts about Rahul's ability to manage the party effectively, with allegations of centralized decision-making and sidelining senior leaders.

title: ‘Then lots of bombs start going off’: Trump on what will happen when Iran ceasefire expires
content: US President Trump has warned of a significant escalation in the Iran conflict, stating "lots of bombs start going off" if a peace deal isn't reached before the current ceasefire expires.  While a US delegation prepares for talks, Iran's participation remains uncertain, with Tehran resisting negotiations under pressure.  Washington's core demand is Iran's renunciation of nuclear weapons.

title: 'This will be my wedding gift': UP groom swaps mandap for morcha over power bill
content: A groom in Banda, facing a pre-wedding power cut, led his baraat to the district magistrate's office demanding a bill waiver.  Kuldeep cited a doubled bill after a smart meter installation, making payment difficult. Officials assured a resolution, prompting the groom to proceed with his wedding, with an inquiry ordered into the disconnection.

title: 'TMC goons switched off lights during BJP roadshow': Delhi CM Rekha Gupta
content: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta alleged TMC "goons" switched off streetlights during her Kolkata roadshow, calling it an attempt to disrupt the event and create a security risk. She stated the public responded by using mobile flashlights, signaling their readiness to support the BJP. Gupta expressed confidence in the BJP's victory in the upcoming West Bengal Assembly elections.

title: 'Narrative played on his mind’: R Ashwin explains Jasprit Bumrah’s dip in form
content: Jasprit Bumrah finally claimed his first wicket of IPL 2026, ending a six-match drought. Following Mumbai Indians' dominant win over Gujarat Titans, Ravichandran Ashwin believes this breakthrough will allow Bumrah to perform at his peak.

title: ‘Kejriwal is a bully’: Bansuri Swaraj after Delhi high court judge refuses to recuse
content: Delhi High Court dismissed Arvind Kejriwal's plea to recuse Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from the excise policy case, deeming it based on conjecture. BJP MP Bansuri Swaraj accused Kejriwal of pressuring the judiciary. Justice Sharma clarified her participation in professional events and family government counsel roles did not indicate bias, stating the plea put the judiciary on trial.

title: WATCH: ‘Celebrating’ runner loses marathon in final seconds as rival steals win
content: A dramatic finish at the Delaware Marathon saw Joshua Jackson snatch victory from Carson Mello in the final metres. Mello, celebrating prematurely, was overtaken by a determined Jackson in a stunning upset. The viral footage serves as a potent reminder that a race is never truly won until the finish line is crossed, highlighting the importance of sustained focus.

title: AI scams costing millions: Experts warn and share safety tips
content: Fraudsters are using advanced AI to create convincing fake videos and voices. They impersonate executives, celebrities and even loved ones to trick people into sending money.  Cybersecurity experts warn that these deepfake scams are becoming more common and sophisticated. Staying vigilant and verifying unexpected requests through separate channels is crucial for protection against these evolving threats.
